result.short_description: MFA policy drift detected — legacy auth not fully blocked on agency tenant
result.work_notes: UIAO drift remediation acknowledged. Identity team notified.

result.short_description: Conditional access policy gap — privileged admin accounts missing FIDO2 requirement
result.close_notes: Conditional access policy updated. FIDO2 authentication method now enforced for all privileged admin accounts via named location + phishing-resistant MFA policy. Verified against IA-2(6) baseline. Change documented in CHG0030001.
result.work_notes: Root cause: CA policy excluded break-glass admin accounts from MFA requirement. Fix: removed break-glass exclusion and issued FIDO2 hardware tokens. Post-implementation review passed.

result.short_description: Deploy UIAO v0.6.1 ServiceNow adapter update to production
result.work_notes: CAB approval received 2026-05-14. Scheduled for maintenance window 2026-05-21 02:00-04:00 UTC.

_meta.notes: Three-record result covering: (1) open incident state=1, (2) closed incident state=7 with full closure metadata, (3) change request state=3 in implementation phase.

expected_behavior: Adapter MUST emit exactly 3 normalized claims — one per element in result.
Adapter MUST map result[0].state == '1' to OpenIncident lifecycle state.
Adapter MUST map result[1].state == '7' (Closed) to ClosedIncident and populate closed_at, close_code, and close_notes on the canonical claim.
Adapter MUST map result[2] as a ChangeRequest claim (not an Incident claim) based on the CHG-prefixed number.
Adapter MUST NOT silently drop result[1].resolved_by — resolved_by is required on closed incident claims for IR-6 evidence.
Adapter MUST populate uiao_control_id on each canonical claim from the source record's uiao_control_id field.
Adapter MUST handle mixed record types (incidents + change requests) in a single result array without type-coercion errors.

primary_citation.quote: Retrieves multiple records for the specified table.

provenance.sanitization: ServiceNow instance hostname replaced with uiao-dev.service-now.com. Bearer token redacted to <TOKEN>. sys_id values are deterministic synthetic 32-char hex strings. Agency codes DOJ and DHS are from the canonical UIAO agency list. User and group references replaced with synthetic identifiers. The _meta block is UIAO-synthetic and not emitted by the real ServiceNow Table API.
